data.title: Self and Relationship
data.summary: The axis between personal identity, autonomy and self-expression, and partnership, cooperation and the encounter with others.

data.title: Resources and Sharing
data.summary: The axis between personal resources, money, values and self-worth, and shared assets, intimacy, debts, transformation and dependency.

data.title: Local and Distant
data.summary: The axis between immediate environment, everyday communication and practical learning, and higher knowledge, distant horizons, beliefs and worldview.

data.title: Private and Public
data.summary: The axis between home, roots, family, emotional foundations and private life, and career, vocation, reputation, authority and public role.

data.title: Creation and Collective
data.summary: The axis between personal creativity, pleasure, romance and individual expression, and friendships, groups, collective projects and shared ideals.

data.title: Control and Surrender
data.summary: The axis between daily work, routines, service, health and practical order, and retreat, unconscious patterns, solitude, release and transcendence.
